single_h1.lead: This heading is one of multiple H1 headings on the page.
variants: Multiple top-level headings dilute document focus for LLM-based answer engines.
A single primary H1 improves section intent clarity for generative retrieval systems.
Consolidating H1 structure strengthens citation confidence for answer extraction.

accessibility_basics.lead: This image reference is missing alt text.
variants: Missing alt text weakens semantic cues that retrieval models use for grounded interpretation.
Descriptive alt text improves verifiable context for LLM-based answer engines.
Adding alt text reduces ambiguity and improves content citability for multimodal retrieval.

content_updated_12_months.lead: This visible date indicates stale content ({{age_days}} days old).
variants: Stale timestamps lower trust for freshness-sensitive answer retrieval.
Recent updates improve temporal reliability for LLM-based answer engines.
Refreshing dated claims helps maintain citation quality in generative search.

no_broken_internal_links.lead: This internal link points to a broken destination (status {{status_code}}).
variants: Broken references reduce evidence continuity for LLM-based answer engines.
Fixing dead links improves verifiable claim trails for generative retrieval systems.
Stable internal sources improve extractability and citation reliability.
Thin section context can weaken extractability for LLM-based answer engines.
Short support text reduces claim grounding and citation confidence in generative retrieval.
Expanding this section with concrete evidence improves semantic clarity for answer extraction.

heading_fragmentation.lead: This heading hands off to another heading before the section is framed.
variants: Too many top-level handoffs can make the outline feel over-split to answer engines.
Add a grounding paragraph before nested subheadings so the section lands before it branches.
Merge adjacent top-level headings when they really belong to one stronger section.

appropriate_paragraph_length.lead: This paragraph has {{word_count}} words (recommended {{max_words}} or fewer).
variants: Long blocks reduce scannability and can degrade extractability for LLM-based answer engines.
Shorter claim units improve evidence isolation for generative retrieval systems.
Splitting this paragraph can improve citation precision and answer alignment.

logical_heading_hierarchy.lead: This heading jumps from {{from_level}} to {{to_level}}, skipping a level.
variants: Hierarchy gaps reduce structural cues used by LLM-based answer engines.
Sequential heading levels improve topical flow for generative retrieval systems.
Consistent heading depth strengthens section traceability and citation quality.
